title: selaginella argentea
intro: Selaginella argentea, also known as the silver spike moss, is a species of evergreen plant in the family Selaginellaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Selaginella argentea include the potential treatment of respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its ability to help reduce fever and alleviate skin conditions. Herbal preparations of Selaginella argentea are often made into teas, infusions, or capsules, and can be used to support overall health and well-being.
